title: pedilanthus bracteatus
intro: Pedilanthus bracteatus, also known as the 'Dragon's Blood Tree', is a succulent plant native to the Americas, characterized by its vibrant red sap and unique branching structure. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pedilanthus bracteatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Pedilanthus bracteatus include a tincture, infusion, and salve, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
